backupDir.description: Directory to store backups. Defaults to ~/.acaclaw/backups

retentionDays.description: Number of days to keep backups before pruning. Default: 30

maxStorageGB.description: Maximum storage in GB before oldest backups are pruned. Default: 10

checksumAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm for backup integrity. Default: sha256

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files to skip (e.g. node_modules, .git)

snapshotBeforeBatch.description: Create a full snapshot before batch operations. Default: true

backupDir.label: Backup Directory
backupDir.help: Where file backups are stored. Default: ~/.acaclaw/backups

retentionDays.label: Retention (days)
retentionDays.help: How many days to keep old backups
